violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The ice machine was turned off and emptied during the time of inspection. Establishment is to clean, sanitize, and allow unit to air dry prior to returning back into service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2026

Per PIC, the dishwashing is still unable to reach the proper sanitization temperature and is not in good repair. District ordered new dishwasher and was installed prior to new school year. Per PIC, dishwasher needs a new booster unit and conveyer mechanism is currently not functioning. Establishment is using single service dishes and utensils and is cleaning and sanitizing cookware in 3-bay until unit is functional. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The automatic chemical dispenser in the ware washing area was observed to be leaking and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Per PIC, the dishwashing is still unable to reach the proper sanitization temperature and is not in good repair. PIC stated that the district has ordered a new dishwasher and will be installed before the new school year. Establishment is currently sending dishes through dishwasher and then sanitizing in the 3-bay sink until machine is replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment is to sanitize utensils and dishes in sanitizing basin of 3-bay sink until unit is repaired and is able to produce a surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment is to sanitize utensils and dishes in sanitizing basin of 3-bay sink until unit is repaired and is able to produce a surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces are to be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
The faucet for the mop sink was observed to be leaking and in poor repair. Plumbing systems must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The load sensing mechanism for the dishwasher area is in poor repair. Staff was observed having to reach into unit to manually engage the mechanism for the dishwasher to start washing cycle. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
The fanguards in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. - Establishment is not to use ice machine until, it has been cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quat) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 180 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermo label (temperature indicator) and high temp thermomotor. Mechanical dishwasher was observed to be at 150 for final rinse. Service call was placed. Establishment is to use 3 bay sink and the Quat sanatizer to sanitize till mechanical dish machine is operating properly. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
Continental Food Warmer located in Kitchen was observed not operating. Equipment must be fixed or removed from kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
